title: QA: Write service layer tests
description: 4 services: ItemsService (10 functions), PickListService (9), PartsService (4), ListingsService (1). Mock ImsClient via vi.mock. Verify endpoint URLs and response unwrapping: response.data.data for lists, response.data.data[0] for single items.

title: QA: Write useSortableTable.test.ts
description: Use renderHook. 18 cases: initial state, default sort key/order, first click → asc, same-key toggle → desc, different key resets to asc, string/number/mixed-type sorting, null/undefined always sort to end (both directions), empty array, single item, mutation protection (original array unchanged).

title: QA: Write Redux slice tests
description: 5 slices: ShopSlice (start here — 1 reducer, simplest), ItemsSlice, PartsSlice (via createEntitySlice factory), PickListSlice, ListingsSlice. Test reducers directly via slice.reducer(state, action(...)). Cover: add/update/remove/setSelected + thunk pending/fulfilled/rejected states.

title: QA: Write FormatUtils.test.ts
description: 2 functions: usdFormatter (Intl.NumberFormat) and formatPercent. Critical: formatPercent multiplies by 100 before formatting — formatPercent(0.5) → '50%', not '0.5%'. Test this explicitly.

title: BUG: callUpdateItemParts and callCreateItemParts are identical
description: Both functions POST to /items/{id}/parts with identical implementation. Intentional (upsert semantics) or accidental duplication? Write tests for both, document behavior, file for dev to confirm.

title: QA: Write FinancialCalculations.test.ts
description: 6 pure functions, no mocking needed. JSDoc has worked examples — use them as test cases. Key: use toBeCloseTo() for all assertions (100/0.3 is repeating decimal). Test divide-by-zero guard in calculateMarginPercent explicitly.

title: BUG: callHaveSufficientParts truthy check is fragile
description: ItemsService line 58: returns response.data.data[0] only when array has length. If API returns [false], length=1 (truthy) so correctly returns false. But if API contract changes (returns null instead of []), it silently returns false for wrong reason. Write tests for all edge cases: [true], [false], [], null, undefined.

title: QA: Set up Vitest test infrastructure
description: Install vitest @testing-library/react @testing-library/user-event @testing-library/jest-dom happy-dom @vitest/coverage-v8. Create vitest.config.ts (happy-dom, globals, setupFiles). Create src/setupTests.ts. Add test/test:run/test:coverage scripts to package.json. Must be done before any test files.

title: BUG: PartsSlice missing setSelectedPart reducer
description: ItemsSlice has setSelectedItem, PickListSlice has setSelectedPickList, but PartsSlice (via createEntitySlice) has no setSelected action. If any component tries to dispatch setSelectedPart it will fail silently. Verify via test and file for dev.
